summary: Completed comprehensive testing of TabPilot Chrome Extension Preview (iteration 4). All new features tested and working: sidebar resize, tab groups with colors, help panel with suggestion form, heatmap with time filters. Backend API 7/7 tests passed. Frontend UI 100% functional.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/ returns 200 with correct message
Backend: GET /api/sessions returns session list
Backend: POST /api/sessions creates session with correct data persistence
Backend: DELETE /api/sessions/{id} removes session correctly
Backend: POST /api/suggestions creates suggestion successfully
Backend: POST /api/suggestions works with empty name (optional)
Backend: POST /api/suggestions rejects missing message (422)
Frontend: Sidebar resize handle works (280px-700px range) - tested 400px→550px→350px
Frontend: Tab groups display with correct colors (Work=blue #8ab4f8, Research=green #81c995, Media=red #f28b82, Shopping=yellow #fdd663)
Frontend: Tab group headers have colored left border
Frontend: Tab alignment correct (ml-3 for ungrouped, ml-5 for grouped tabs)
Frontend: Tab groups are collapsible - shows 'collapsed' text when collapsed
Frontend: Help panel opens with help toggle button (?)
Frontend: Help panel has 'How to Use' and 'Suggest' tabs
Frontend: Help panel shows Quick Tips and Keyboard Shortcuts
Frontend: Privacy disclaimer visible with password/browser data mentions
Frontend: Suggestion form has name input, message textarea, submit button
Frontend: Suggestion form POSTs to /api/suggestions successfully
Frontend: Success toast shown after suggestion submission
Frontend: Heatmap panel opens from quick actions
Frontend: Heatmap time filters present (Day/Week/Month/Custom)
Frontend: Heatmap Day filter shows 'Today (active minutes per hour)'
Frontend: Heatmap Month filter shows 'This Month (hours per week)'
Frontend: Heatmap Custom filter shows date range inputs (From/To)
Frontend: Heatmap shows time in hours (4.2h, 3.1h, etc.) not visit counts
Frontend: Bar chart and timeline chart render correctly
Frontend: Search functionality filters tabs
Frontend: Context menu works on right-click with all options
Frontend: Stats bar visible with memory/CPU indicators
Frontend: Duplicate detection indicator visible ('1 duplicate')
Frontend: Focus Mode activates with timer and workflow tabs
Frontend: Dark theme active by default
seed_data_creation: Test sessions and suggestions created during testing are cleaned up or identified with TEST_ prefix
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features from PRD are implemented and working. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_tabpilot_api.py cover all API endpoints. The app uses mock data via mockData.js for Chrome tab simulation. Dark theme is default. Key data-testid attributes: help-toggle-btn, action-heatmap, action-focus-mode, tab-group-header-{id}, heatmap-filter-{day|week|month|custom}, suggestion-form, privacy-disclaimer.

mocked_integrations.Chrome tabs API: Simulated via mockData.js and useMockTabs.js hook - all tab data is mock
